---
title: "Course Calendar"
date: "2026-06-17"
draft: false
class: "115"
categories: "syllabus"

---
# Course Calendar

This course calendar provides an overview of the topic for each week. Dates indicate the Monday of the week that you should complete the assignment. **Bold dates are specific due dates.** Some topics and modules span multiple weeks. You will be asked to complete reading assignments, watch lectures, and complete other activities for each module.

> **IMPORTANT:** Due dates for modules and readings are available in Canvas. All assigned readings are also available on Leganto linked to in Canvas, except for *Air Conditioning*, which is required for purchase. Please review the dates and materials at the beginning of the class. There may be adjustments to the readings and materials as the class progresses.

| Date | Topic |
|------|-------|
| 08/24/26 | Introduction to the class, instructor, and course requirements |
| 08/31/26 | Introduction to Environmental Health |
| 09/07/26 | Exploring your Values *(Note: Labor Day 09/07 — campus closed; plan accordingly)* |
| **09/11/26** | **Values exercise due** |
| 09/14/26 | Water |
| 09/21/26 | Land |
| 09/28/26 | Air |
| 10/05/26 | Causes of Climate Change |
| **10/09/26** | **Exam 1** – Introduction to Environmental Health, Water, Land, Air |
| 10/12/26 | Climate Change, the Environment, and Human Health |
| 10/19/26 | Sustainability |
| 10/26/26 | Introduction to the Anthropocene |
| **10/30/26** | **Exam 2** – Causes of Climate Change through Sustainability |
| 11/02/26 | The Anthropocene and Health – Planetary Health Framework |
| 11/09/26 | The Built Environment |
| 11/16/26 | The Built Environment and Health – Introduction, Chapters 1–3 |
| **11/13/26** | **Essay 1 due** |
| 11/23/26 | *Fall Recess – no classes (campus closed Nov. 26–27)* |
| 11/30/26 | The Built Environment and the Anthropocene – Chapters 5 & 6 |
| **12/11/26** | **Essay 2 due** *(Last day of classes)* |
